title: Nostalgia Vanilla
description: Optimized client modpack for minecraft servers project.
body:
Optimized client modpack for minecraft servers project.

**Support 1.21.1 and 1.20.4 (check versions)**

### Key Features:

- **Performance Boost**: Includes a selection of mods that significantly improve FPS (frames per second) and reduce lag, making gameplay more fluid and responsive.
- **Enhanced Visuals**: Optimizes graphics settings and textures without compromising performance, providing a visually appealing experience.
- **Client-Side Only**: All included mods are client-side. This means you can use this modpack on any server that allows client-side mods.

### Key Mods

- **Sodium**: Improves rendering performance by significantly increasing FPS and reducing lags.
- **Lithium**: Optimizes server processes, improving performance in both single and multiplayer games.
- **ScalableLux**: Improves the performance of light updates.
- **Ferrite Core**: Reduces memory usage by optimizing data storage.
- **EntityCulling**: Hides entities that are not visible to the player, which reduces the load on the processor and video card.
- **Dynamic FPS**: Reduces FPS when the game is minimized or in the background, which saves system resources
